title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Footprint Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Footprint Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint Holdings Services:
Reliance Footprint Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services!
